spec_match.rationale: Exceptional spec mapping. Exhaustively teaches developers all variations of catching DOMException vs QuotaExceededError class and explains backwards compatibility constraints.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Allows selecting and live-running catching scripts on synthetic exceptions, rendering interactive instanceof evaluation grids.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fits the developer catching guidelines perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Thoroughly models edge cases like older browsers lacking the QuotaExceededError global class.

references.rationale: Includes proper feature index links, basics demo link, and ChromeStatus entry references.

design_system.rationale: Perfect layout, color coding matching emerald/amber/rose, and clean monospaced font tokens.

summary: A spectacular and thorough developer guidance playground. It teaches five diverse catching patterns with interactive evaluators, visualizes a live instanceof inspection matrix, teaches optional chaining field usage, and includes comprehensive documentation.
